results.title: Bananas Might Be The Key To New, Sustainable Textiles
results.description: The textile and fashion industries are bad for the environment, but we might be able to reduce that negative impact by switching to banana cloth.

results.title: Honor Robot Phone leak reveals high-end specs and launch month
results.description: Honor previewed the Robot Phone earlier this year with a gimbal-stabilized main camera mounted on a robotic arm. A leak has now revealed several details about the upcoming device, including its display, chipset, and camera setup.
